mapper.select: SELECT fe.* FROM flyer_evaluation fe LEFT JOIN user_flyer uf ON fe.flyer_id = uf.flyer_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON uf.user_id = su.user_id WHERE fe.flyer_id = #{flyerId} ORDER BY fe.created_at DESC

SELECT AVG((fe.score_quality + fe.score_punctuality + fe.score_attitude + fe.score_efficiency) / 4.0) AS total_score FROM flyer_evaluation fe LEFT JOIN user_flyer uf ON fe.flyer_id = uf.flyer_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON uf.user_id = su.user_id WHERE fe.flyer_id = #{flyerId}

SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN (fe.score_quality + fe.score_punctuality + fe.score_attitude + fe.score_efficiency) > 14 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS positive_rate FROM flyer_evaluation fe LEFT JOIN user_flyer uf ON fe.flyer_id = uf.flyer_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON uf.user_id = su.user_id WHERE fe.flyer_id = #{flyerId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flyer_evaluation fe LEFT JOIN user_flyer uf ON fe.flyer_id = uf.flyer_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON uf.user_id = su.user_id WHERE fe.flyer_id = #{flyerId}
SELECT * FROM flyer_evaluation WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND farmer_id = #{farmerId}
SELECT * FROM user_flyer WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
